scenarios.title: Protect ISRO
scenarios.description: Indian satellite asset faces a high-risk conjunction and OrbitGuard plans a safe avoidance maneuver.

scenarios.title: 2009 Iridium-Cosmos Replay
scenarios.description: Historical collision replay showing how OrbitGuard would structure an avoidance decision before the Iridium 33 and Cosmos 2251 event.

scenarios.title: Kessler Sandbox
scenarios.description: Educational sandbox showing how debris growth can increase conjunction pressure across an orbital shell.
